transcript: GM everybody. My name is Kha. I'm the CEO and Co-Founder at Birdeye. Okay, so very brief introduction about Birdeye. So we currently one of the leading crypto data provider on Solana. We actually the number one crypto trading data provider on Solana and we are among the top across the whole industry. We are serving about over 4,000 enterprise data clients, many of them actually among the audience today, so thank you very much. And okay, so in the last year we actually started our market intelligence service with the first flagship market reports called Stablecoin Reports. We did that with Perena and MoonPay. It was very well received across the ecosystem. And today, we introducing our next flagship market reports on real-world assets, we call it RWA Spectrum 2025 reports. And we did it with R3, Centrifuge, Backed Finance with XStocks. So you can actually go to birdeye.so/research or you can just scanning that QR code right there to read that reports. It gonna give you the overview, the overall ideas about the real-world assets and how developed it is right now. It is growing year on year 106 times in the 2025 alone. And the next one we gonna do is the State of Solana reports. Going to be released in the next, in the early Q1 next year, 2026. And then if you guys want to be featured in that reports, just let us know, keep in touch and then reach out to us. We can talk about that. Alright, but I'm here not only to talk about what we did in the past. I'm here also to talk about the next problem we want to solve. And that's it, the crypto data for institutions and professionals. So what we are having right now in the market is that if you want to learn about any particular projects, assets, or teams, you actually have to go to a dozen of websites. And you have to read a lot of reports, market and everything. So all the information and the data is very fragmented. It's very slow. And many of time is incorrected. The wrong data is actually happen more often than many people may think. And the worst of all is that professionals are making the decisions worthing millions and billions of dollars based on unqualified data. And that is what the shocking truth that we found during when we built our products and business. So what's the solution for this? It turns out that we already have that solutions in the traditional financial world. They have the tools like Bloomberg Terminal, FactSet, I'm sure that you all very familiar with it. And they solve it very well. But their crypto content is actually not as good as what we have right now right here at Birdeye. So what we do is that we say, okay, why not we learn that awesome TradFi UX but we infuse with very super rich crypto content. And we built exactly that. And we call them Birdeye Peak. So what is Birdeye Peak? Birdeye Peak is the complete visualizations of the crypto world in one single platform. By the way, you can just go access to the sign up page by scanning that QR code. I gonna just put them there, put it there to the end of my speech so you can just scanning that one. Okay. So what is Birdeye Peak? So what we did is that we actually studied all the people working in the professional financial world. Investment bankers, family office, fund managers, project leaders. We studied their workflow, their daily habits. How they work, how they analyze things, how they make their decisions. What button on the keyboard they want to press. You know, that kind of tiny things. And then we build this tool, Birdeye Peak. We have, we equipped it with super rich data set, very smooth navigations. You can get to any data that you need under 5 seconds. And then a lot of the data, like crypto data is very noisy. I'm sure that many of you know that one. So we actually have a, we put an enormous amount of time and effort to cleaning the data and a lot of the data we actually have to do it manually. So you can imagine like how many time and effort we put into that one. And then we equipped it with a lot of institutional graded tools. With, you know, market indexes, portfolio management tools and stuff like that. And then we result with this one. And today I'm very proud to announce that we going to release our closed beta in Q1 2026. And that is only being open to a very small group of curated pre-registered users. So make sure that you scan the QR code, put in your informations. We gonna get in touch. And really hope to see you guys over there. And I really hope to, that we can actually work together to build this tool to become the golden standard for the institutional crypto market. Thank you very much.

sources.title: Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults
sources.snippet:
Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults[Accessibility Statement](https://www.cision.com/about/accessibility/)[Skip Navigation](#main)
# Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults
[![Plume Network Logo (PRNewsfoto/Plume Network)]( "Plume Network Logo (PRNewsfoto/Plume Network)")](#)
## News provided by
[**Plume Network**](https://www.prnewswire.com/news/plume-network/)
Dec 05, 2025, 09:15 ET

*Nest vaults with assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal and issuers including Securitize and SuperState mark the beginning of a new yield economy forSolana.*
NEW YORK,Dec. 5, 2025/PRNewswire/ --[Plume](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=1349188964&u=https://plume.org/&a=Plume), the leading RWA blockchain powering real-world yield, today announced the launch of five RWA Nest vaults onSolana, setting real-world yield as a new base layer for the ecosystem and marking an important first step in Plume's multichain expansion for Nest.
Launching the vaults natively onSolanagives users direct investment opportunities to institutional-grade assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal, and issuers including Securitize and SuperState.Solanausers can natively access onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables and the ability to earn institutional-grade real-world yield.
With the launch of nBASIS, nOPAL, nWISDOM, nALPHA and nTBILL Vaults,Solana's 20+ million users can soon deposit stablecoins natively into Nest to unlock reliable, stable, real-world APY. Each deposit returns a Nest vaulttoken, a liquid, yield-bearing asset that accrues value over time and can move seamlessly acrossSolanaDeFi, from DEX liquidity pools to lending and structured products, with the ability to redeem at any point.
As part of this integration, Plume is also launching a deep partnership with[Squads Lab](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=2271106279&u=https://squads.xyz/&a=Squads+Lab),Solana's leading multi-sig and treasury management infrastructure provider. Plume will introduce its RWA yield pipelines across the Squads ecosystem, including a bespoke vault integrated for Altitude users and seamless RWA yield access for developers building with Grid.
*"Cryptois moving past the era of synthetic yield and into a market grounded in real economics. Stablecoins brought millions intocrypto, but yieldcoins will keep them here. This integration withSolanais the next step in building a transparent, programmable financial system at scale."*said Teddy Pornprinya, Co-Founder and CBO at Plume.
*"Plume already anchors over half of the industry's RWA activity, andSolanahas become one of the most efficient, high-throughput environments incrypto, making it a natural home for onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables. Bringing our strengths together is how we unlock the next phase of onchain finan*ce".
By introducing institutional RWAs at scale, Plume is expanding theSolanaDeFiecosystem with sustainable, composable yield infrastructure that can underpin the next generation ofSolana-native financial applications.
Solanausers can instantly access boosted yield opportunities with Nest.
The Plume Nest Points Program is a rewards framework designed to turn participation into ownership. Users can earn Plume Nest Points by holding and using Nest vault tokens. The more users hold and deploy, the more they earn as part of the Season One program.
Solanausers will also soon unlock boosted yield opportunities with direct access to lending markets on Loopscale. These platform integrations allow leverage

tags.impact_reason: Birdeye's launch of 'Peak,' a Bloomberg Terminal-like platform for crypto data, is a solid update that could attract more institutional interest in Solana, but its immediate impact is uncertain.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a monolithic data terminal as the Semantic Anchor because the story is a direct challenge to the iconic Bloomberg Terminal, representing a new peak of institutional data intelligence. The name 'Peak' also evokes this idea of a summit or monolith. For the diegetic text, I chose '106X' because it's a powerful, specific data point mentioned in the transcript regarding RWA growth, instantly communicating the terminal's function: delivering high-impact, verified market intelligence.
visual_idea.description: A sleek, monolithic data terminal made of polished obsidian and smoked glass stands in a dark, minimalist command center. Intricate, holographic charts and data streams in cyan and magenta glow on its surface, reflecting off the dark material. One prominent holographic projection displays the key metric '106X' with a bright, commanding glow. The background is a vast, out-of-focus digital nebula, representing the chaotic, fragmented web of raw crypto data that this terminal brings into sharp, actionable focus.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A sleek, monumental data terminal made of highly polished obsidian and dark smoked glass stands prominently in a dark, ultra-minimalist command center, composed for a vertical 3:4 aspect ratio to emphasize its epic height and scale, with ample negative space above. Intricate, flowing holographic charts and data streams in vibrant cyan and magenta glow intensely on its surface, reflecting off the deep, dark material. One prominent, commanding holographic projection displays the key metric '106X' with a bright, luminous glow, appearing to float just above the terminal surface. The background is a vast, dramatically out-of-focus digital nebula, representing the chaotic, fragmented web of raw crypto data that this powerful monolith brings into sharp, actionable focus. The scene is bathed in cinematic volumetric lighting, with deep shadows and high contrast, creating a hyperrealistic and photoreal detail. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, ultra-realistic lighting, dramatic lighting, deep shadows, reflective surfaces.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a monolithic data terminal as the Semantic Anchor because the story is a direct challenge to the iconic Bloomberg Terminal, representing a new peak of institutional data intelligence. The name 'Peak' also evokes this idea of a summit or monolith. For the diegetic text, I chose '106X' because it's a powerful, specific data point mentioned in the transcript regarding RWA growth, instantly communicating the terminal's function: delivering high-impact, verified market intelligence.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on the surface of the obsidian terminal. We see chaotic, fragmented particles of red light being drawn towards a processing line on the screen. As they cross the line, they are instantly transformed into a clean, organized, and unified stream of glowing cyan data, forming a perfect, ascending vector. The image captures the moment of transformation from raw noise to pristine signal.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A tight macro shot, perfectly symmetrical and centrally focused, filling the entire 1:1 square frame. The subject is the highly reflective, polished obsidian surface of a sleek data terminal, its deep, dark, glossy texture filling the frame. Chaotic, fragmented particles of intense red light are dramatically drawn across the obsidian surface towards a distinct, glowing processing line on the terminal's screen. As these raw, noisy particles cross the line, they instantly transform with a burst of energy into a clean, organized, unified stream of vivid, glowing cyan holographic data, forming a perfect, ascending vector of pristine signal. The image precisely captures the moment of transformation from raw noise to an elegant, high-fidelity data stream. The scene is illuminated with dramatic cinematic volumetric lighting, casting deep, crisp shadows and emphasizing the brilliant glow of the data against the dark, reflective obsidian surface, creating a high-contrast cyber-noir atmosphere. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, realistic materials, detailed textures.

editorial.headline: Birdeye Unveils "Peak" Terminal to Challenge Bloomberg for Crypto Data
editorial.standfirst: Solana's top data provider targets the institutional gap with a new terminal designed to replace fragmented workflows with verified, cleaned market intelligence.
key_takeaways: Birdeye Peak launches closed beta in Q1 2026 for curated institutional partners.
New terminal aims to solve "unqualified data" risks for 4,000+ enterprise clients.
Report reveals RWA sector grew 106x in 2025, driving demand for professional tooling.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a keynote that addressed the "shocking truth" of institutional decision-making, **Birdeye** CEO Kha Nguyen revealed that professional investors are frequently moving millions of dollars based on fragmented and incorrect crypto data. To bridge this gap, the company announced **Birdeye Peak**, a specialized terminal designed to bring the user experience of **Bloomberg** and **FactSet** to the on-chain world. The platform promises to unify the scattered landscape of crypto analytics into a single, high-fidelity interface capable of retrieving complex datasets in under five seconds.

The announcement comes as the Solana ecosystem sees a dramatic shift toward institutional adoption, particularly in Real-World Assets (RWAs). According to **Birdeye**'s newly released *RWA Spectrum 2025* report—produced in partnership with **R3**, **Centrifuge**, and **Backed Finance**—the RWA sector expanded by a staggering 106x in 2025 alone. This explosion in asset volume has outpaced the infrastructure available to analyze it, creating a dangerous blind spot for fund managers and family offices accustomed to the rigorous standards of traditional finance.

**Birdeye Peak** differentiates itself through an aggressive focus on data sanitation. Nguyen highlighted that while raw on-chain data is often "noisy," the new terminal relies on a hybrid automated and manual cleaning process to ensure accuracy before it reaches the user. Scheduled for a closed beta release in Q1 2026, the platform will feature institutional-grade portfolio management tools and market indexes, positioning itself as the "golden standard" for a market that has historically prioritized speed over precision.
